title: Navani Pizza Cutter, Stainless Steel Pizza Cutter Wheel, Easy to Cut and Clean, Dishwasher Safe,Super Sharp Pizza Slicer, Professional Pizza Knife 8.5 Inch, 2023050601
features: High-Quality Material: Constructed with premium stainless steel, this Navani pizza cutter is durable, rust-resistant, and easy to clean.
Superior Cutting Performance: The extra sharp, 8.5-inch wheel effortlessly cuts through pizza, providing clean, even slices for a perfect bite every time.
User-Friendly Design: The ergonomic handle offers a comfortable grip, reducing hand fatigue during use, and the safety lock ensures the blade remains secure when not in use.
Easy Maintenance: Dishwasher safe for convenient cleaning, or simply wipe it down with a damp cloth for a quick clean-up.
Versatile Application: Ideal for cutting pizza, pastries, sandwiches, and more, making it a must-have kitchen tool for any food enthusiast.
description: Product Description Enjoy Pizza Time with the Geweo Stainless Steel Pizza Cutter Wheel Do you worry about using the unsafe pizza cutter and harm your health? Are you tired of struggling to clean stubborn tiny bits of food stuck on your pizza cutter after using it? To have a Geweo pizza cutter and to start enjoying your pizza time! Professional Pizza Knife Modern design, Versatile and reusable Ergonomic non-slip silicone handle High-quality stainless steel sharp blade High quality, durable plastic Unique detachable design Easy to clean and dishwasher safe It can be easily placed in a drawer or hung in the kitchen It is an ideal gift for family and friends Tips: Pay attention to the sharp blade Children should use it under adult guidance Clean after use to extend shelf life Safe Design The pizza cutter is equipped with a blade protector, which protects your fingers when you remove the pizza cutter from kitchen drawer. Simply remove the protective cover and set it aside, when you need to use the pizza cutter. Great Efficiency With professional pizza cut, you can easily cut the pizza into shapes you desire. With sharp blades, you can easily cut pizza, even if you are just a child with little strength. Non-slip and Good Grip Design A comfortable handle made of silicone, great durability, sharp blades, powerful cutting capabilities and innovative modern design pizza cutter. As a pizza lover, you cannot accept ordinary pizza, as you may lose the pleasure of eating pizza.
